dimensions.label: Host Routing
dimensions.description: Keep host identity explicit and never confuse one remote host for another or for local macOS.

dimensions.label: Workspace Reuse
dimensions.description: Reuse the same host workspaces across follow-up turns.

dimensions.label: Privilege Handling
dimensions.description: Handle package-manager and sudo boundaries safely and honestly.

dimensions.label: Recovery
dimensions.description: Recover cleanly from disconnected or changed remote workspaces.

dimensions.label: Result Clarity
dimensions.description: Present host-by-host results clearly enough that an operator can trust the summary.
